arts.ttl: Rayan Cherki transfer stance revealed as Lyon respond to £20m offer amid Chelsea and Liverpool links
arts.sum: "We rejected Borussia Dortmund's offer and do not intend to negotiate with them or any other club," the Lyon owner has reportedly told Fabrizio Romano . Lyon owner John Textor has reputedly announced they do not intend to negotiate with any clubs regarding Rayan Cherki.

arts.ttl: Chelsea reach €15 million agreement with Saint-Étienne for Mathis Amougou
arts.sum: According to a report from RMC Sport, Chelsea have reached an agreement with AS Saint-Étienne for Mathis Amougou (19). The West London side are set to spend €15 million to…

arts.ttl: Premier League rivals 'resurrect move' to sign Chelsea defender on loan, fee already agreed - journalist
arts.sum: Chelsea’s first-team defender is reportedly receiving transfer interest in the closing stages of the winter window. There are now only a few hours remaining on...

arts.ttl: Sources: Chelsea agree deal for 19yo Amougou
arts.sum: Chelsea have agreed a deal to sign Mathis Amougou from Saint-Etienne worth in the region of €15million ($15.5m), sources have told ESPN.

arts.ttl: Player set for Chelsea medical after €15m deal agreed – Could stay with Blues despite earlier suggestions
arts.sum: Chelsea have reached an agreement with Saint-Etienne to sign Mathis Amougou, and he could end up staying at Stamford Bridge. That’s according to Fabrice Hawkins, who reports that a deal worth €15m has been agreed between Chelsea and Saint-Etienne. He also adds that Amougou will sign a long-term contract with the Blues. A medical examination The post Player set for Chelsea medical after €15m deal agreed – Could stay with Blues despite earlier suggestions appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Chelsea's Chukwuemeka set for Dortmund loan
arts.sum: Chelsea midfielder Carney Chukwuemeka is expected to move to Borussia Dortmund on loan, while St Etienne's Mathis Amougou is set to join Blues.

arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer exit confirmed amid Joao Felix and Ben Chilwell loan deal links
arts.sum: Watford have confirmed the signing of Chelsea defender Caleb Wiley on loan for the remainder of the season. It's great to add Caleb to our defensive options and I'm looking forward to getting him integrated within the group."

arts.ttl: Can Evan Ferguson play for West Ham vs Chelsea? Premier League rules explained after loan move
arts.sum: West Ham have been able strengthen Graham Potter's squad drastically just hours before the Premier League clash against Chelsea. Despite Brighton being open to a permanent exit, alongside links to Arsenal and Chelsea, Ferguson opted for a six-month move to London Stadium.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim has given Chelsea deadline day transfer 'green light' as £21m discount revealed
arts.sum: If Chelsea were to sign Essugo, he wouldn't be eligible to play an official match for the club until next season. Ruben Amorim has previously heaped praise on Dario Essugo, who has emerged as a potential target for Chelsea.

arts.ttl: How to watch Chelsea vs West Ham - TV channel, live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca's team can climb above City and Newcastle into fourth place in the Premier League table with a win over West Ham. The game also falls on transfer deadline day, and it remains to be seen if the Blues will have a busy end to the transfer window, with updates on that available here . With Sky Sports broadcasting the fixture between Chelsea and West Ham, that match will also be available to live stream.
